data.name: Capital Town Center
data.description:
All Resources can be dropped off here. Produces Villagers, Scouts, Officials, and increases your maximum Population. Adds additional attacks while garrisoned.
Capital Town Centers can detect stealth or disguises.

data.name: Dock
data.description:
Produces naval units.
Automatically repairs nearby damaged naval units.
Capable of holding up to three Fishing Ships.

variations.name: Dock
variations.description:
Produces naval units.
Automatically repairs nearby damaged naval units.

data.name: Dragon Pavilion
data.description:
Grants a free Meng'an Mouke Emplacement to all Town Centers and comes with a Meng'an Mouke Emplacement.
Trains Emissaries at a 33% discount and spawns 1 free Emissary upon completion.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

variations.name: Dragon Pavilion
variations.description:
Grants a free Meng'an Mouke Emplacement to all Town Centers and comes with a Meng'an Mouke Emplacement.
Trains Emissaries at a 33% discount and spawns 1 free Emissary upon completion.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Enclave of the Emperor
data.description: Build and defend a Wonder to secure victory. Rival civilizations will be aware of its construction and seek to destroy it.

data.name: Farm
data.description:
Harvestable Food source. Use a Villager to gather Food from the Farm.
Only one Villager can work each Farm.

variations.name: Farm
variations.description:
Harvestable Food source. Use a Villager to gather Food from the Farm.

data.name: Flower Pagoda
data.description:
Grants the ability to plant a Flower Garden which improves the gather rate of Villagers and the attack speed of non-siege military units as long as they are in the Flower Garden.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

variations.name: Flower Pagoda
variations.description:
Grants the ability to plant a Flower Garden which improves the gather rate of Villagers and the attack speed of non-siege military units as long as they are in the Flower Garden.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Grassland
data.description:
Must be constructed on a Grassland Post.
Spawns a Horse up to the max of 5 every 90/60/45 seconds in Feudal/Castle/Imperial Ages. Each Horse in a Grassland grants +2 maximum Health to all Melee Cavalry and +1 to all Ranged Cavalry.
Horses can be used by War Stables in Influence to instantly train Cavalry at a 25 resources discount.

variations.name: Grassland
variations.description:
Must be constructed on a Grassland Post.
Spawns a Horse up to the max of 5 every 90/60/45 seconds in Feudal/Castle/Imperial Ages. Each Horse in a Grassland grants +2 maximum Health to all Melee Cavalry and +1 to all Ranged Cavalry.
Horses can be used by War Stables in Influence to instantly train Cavalry at a 25 resources discount.
influences: Use a Horse from a Grassland to instantly train Cavalry with a 25 resource discount.

data.description:
Acts as a War Stable and Grassland.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Great Wall Bastion
data.description:
Acts as a Keep with 4 mounted Bed Crossbow weapons instead of regular emplacements.
Increases the damage of all Bed Crossbow projectiles by +3.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Monastery
data.description: Produces religious units and houses religious technologies. Starting in the Castle Age (III), religious units can pick up Relics and place them in this building to generate Gold.

data.name: Mountain Hall
data.description:
Acts as a Monastery and Monasteries are 50% cheaper.
Generate Karma by gathering resources near Monasteries. Losing units decreases Karma. At max Karma, receive the blessing of the Four Heavenly Kings for 60 seconds.
- Buildings regenerate 50 health per second.
- Villagers gather from Farms +75% faster.
- Relics generate +300% more gold.
- Defenses attack +50% faster.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

variations.name: Mountain Hall
variations.description:
Acts as a Monastery and Monasteries are 50% cheaper.
Generate Karma by gathering resources near Monasteries. Losing units decreases Karma. At max Karma, receive the blessing of the Four Heavenly Kings for 60 seconds.
- Buildings regenerate 50 health per second.
- Villagers gather from Farms +75% faster.
- Relics generate +300% more gold.
- Defenses attack +50% faster.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Outpost
data.description: Offers extensive line of sight and detects units stealth or disguises. Can be upgraded with weaponry and fortifications. Attacks while garrisoned.

variations.name: Outpost
variations.description: Offers extensive line of sight and detects units stealth or disguises. Can be upgraded with weaponry and fortifications. Attacks while garrisoned.

data.name: Pagoda Forest
data.description:
Spawns a Small Pagoda Forest nearby every 30 seconds up to a cap of 15. Each Small Pagoda Forest generates 20 Wood every 30 seconds and slows nearby enemy movement speed by 20%.
May garrison up to 3 Monks to cast a large cascading conversion, which grows larger for every Monk garrisoned.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

variations.name: Pagoda Forest
variations.description:
Spawns a Small Pagoda Forest nearby every 30 seconds up to a cap of 15. Each Small Pagoda Forest generates 20 Wood every 30 seconds and slows nearby enemy movement speed by 20%.
May garrison up to 3 Monks to cast a large cascading conversion, which grows larger for every Monk garrisoned.
Spawns 3 Grassland Posts. Only one Grassland may be constructed on these Grassland Posts.

data.name: Stone Wall
data.description:
Sturdy wall that cannot be attacked by torches. 
Units on walls take 25% less damage from ranged attacks, 50% less damage from siege attacks, and their range is increased by +1.

data.description:

Infantry can use the gate to access the top of the walls.
